name: Keyword Extractor Pro
description: Extract keywords, analyze SEO, generate word clouds, and optimize content

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none';
